overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character navigates busy sidewalks, crosses intersections with crowds, and walks under elevated highways while surrounded by towering buildings with holographic advertisements and atmospheric rain effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian sidewalk adjacent to multi-lane street

events.description: slight turn to the right while approaching intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk next to a busy street, approaching an intersection with traffic lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing green umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: overhanging building structure providing shelter from rain
metal railing separating sidewalk from street with blue and yellow stripes
large elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street
tall buildings with illuminated neon signage and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-slicked covered sidewalk in a dense cyberpunk city. The street to the left has moderate traffic with cars moving through the rain. A pedestrian with a distinctive glowing green umbrella walks ahead. The elevated highway structure looms in the distance while neon signs illuminate the buildings across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection crosswalk under elevated highway

events.description: steps off sidewalk and enters wide intersection crosswalk
looks up revealing the underside of elevated highway with orange neon strip lighting

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while looking around at the towering buildings and elevated structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red glowing umbrella crossing in the same direction

entered.detail: large floating holographic display showing vehicle advertisements
vertical billboard with AVANTE branding and neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Crossing a wide rain-soaked intersection beneath an elevated highway structure adorned with orange neon lighting. The camera looks up to reveal the massive scale of the cyberpunk architecture. A pedestrian with a red glowing umbrella crosses nearby. Holographic advertisements float above the street while traffic moves through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with digital advertising kiosks and palm trees

events.description: reaches opposite sidewalk and continues walking past digital advertising displays

agents.ego_description: walking along the opposite sidewalk, passing advertising kiosks and observing the street

entered.detail: distinctive cylindrical building with circular rooftop structure in the distance
tall digital display kiosk showing animated advertisements
tall palm trees lining the street median

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite sidewalk featuring digital advertising kiosks and palm trees lining the street. The elevated highway recedes into the background. The sidewalk is less crowded here, with occasional pedestrians passing in the opposite direction. A distinctive curved skyscraper is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crosswalk under elevated highway overpass

events.description: stops at crosswalk to wait for traffic light while pedestrians gather
traffic light changes and begins crossing the street with a group of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the street with a crowd of pedestrians under the overpass

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting at crosswalk then crossing together

entered.detail: concrete support pillars and underside of the elevated highway creating a covered area
bold yellow and black striped crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: Approaching and crossing another intersection beneath the elevated highway overpass. The area is sheltered from rain by the concrete structure overhead. A crowd of pedestrians waits at the yellow-striped crosswalk before crossing together. The environment feels more enclosed here with the massive concrete pillars surrounding the crossing area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: completes crossing and enters covered walkway section under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway overpass where the sidewalk is partially covered and protected from rain

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red neon umbrella walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: building facade with overhang providing shelter along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sidewalk partially sheltered by the elevated highway overhead and building overhangs. The rain is less intense here due to the cover. A pedestrian with a distinctive red neon umbrella passes by walking in the opposite direction. The AVANTE billboard is now closer on the left, and the environment has a more enclosed, urban canyon feel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district, moving from a dense covered walkway across a massive intersection and onto a more open urban boulevard. It begins along a sheltered sidewalk where neon signs reflect off wet pavement and a pedestrian with a glowing green umbrella leads the way past flowing traffic. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens up into a wide, rain-soaked intersection beneath the looming orange glow of an elevated highway, where the perspective shifts upward to reveal towering architecture and floating holographic advertisements. The movement then carries the viewer across the street, passing a pedestrian with a red glowing umbrella before transitioning onto an opposite sidewalk lined with digital kiosks and palm trees. Finally, the elevated highway recedes into the background as the camera advances toward a distant, curved skyscraper under the atmospheric city lights.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a sheltered urban corridor that shifts from an open intersection to a narrow, neon-lit city canyon. It begins by approaching and crossing a yellow-striped intersection beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, where a crowd of pedestrians gathers among towering pillars. As the camera moves forward, the environment becomes more enclosed, transitioning from the open crossing to a sidewalk partially shielded by building overhangs and the overhead structure. The scene then tightens as a pedestrian with a red neon umbrella passes by, while the surrounding architecture creates a claustrophobic feel. Finally, the perspective draws closer to a glowing AVANTE billboard on the left, deepening the sense of being immersed in a dense, rainy metropolitan alley.
